blocker_groups.evidence_required: Scoped Canadian import/export, food, customs, or broker review finding.
blocker_groups.next_valid_move: Generate a compliance review packet and request qualified review.
blocker_groups.stage: P0 - Must fix before customer/private beta
blocker_groups.title: Compliance Review

blocker_groups.evidence_required: Signed source-rights, data-rights, or commercial terms record.
blocker_groups.next_valid_move: Attach source-rights or commercial terms before external use.
blocker_groups.stage: P0 - Must fix before customer/private beta
blocker_groups.title: Source Rights / Contract

blocker_groups.evidence_required: Dated buyer/operator feedback tied to the packet and intended use.
blocker_groups.next_valid_move: Collect buyer/operator validation before demand or PMF claims.
blocker_groups.stage: P0 - Must fix before customer/private beta
blocker_groups.title: Buyer Validation

buyer_broker_questions: Who is the Canadian importer of record for this shipment?
Which Incoterms or delivery responsibility applies?
What HS/tariff classification should a qualified reviewer use for the product?
Does the product need CFIA/AIRS, import permit, controlled goods, sanctions, or restricted-party review?
Which product specs, invoice/proforma, packing list, certificate, proof-of-origin, and contract documents are still missing?
Can the Canadian buyer or broker confirm the next valid evidence to collect?
next_valid_move: Generate a compliance review packet and request qualified review.
plain_english_next_steps: Confirm the product, origin, destination, buyer/importer, supplier/exporter, HS code if known, and Incoterms.
Attach product specs, invoice or proforma, packing list, certificates, proof of origin, and shipping details where available.
Refresh official/reference sources and keep the accessed date and source boundary.
Route the packet to a broker, customs, food/import, privacy/security, or trade reviewer for scoped findings before external claims.
proof_boundary: This report lists missing inputs and review questions only; it does not approve trade action.
